scripts.check:python: python -m ruff format --check . && python -m ruff check . && python scripts/run_pyright.py && python -m pytest
scripts.acceptance:p1: pnpm check && pnpm build && pnpm run doctor && python -m scripts.doctor --online && pnpm run acceptance:persistence && pnpm run acceptance:model && pnpm run acceptance:capability && pnpm run acceptance:p1-main-agent && pnpm run acceptance:runtime && pnpm run acceptance:security
scripts.acceptance:security: python -m pytest tests/core/test_metadata.py tests/model/test_adapter.py tests/capability tests/runtime/test_general_agent.py tests/runtime/test_persistent_runtime.py tests/runtime/test_capability_recovery.py tests/runtime/test_observability.py tests/test_cli.py
scripts.acceptance:v0.1: pnpm check && pnpm build && pnpm run doctor && python -m scripts.doctor --online && python -m scripts.doctor --web && pnpm run acceptance:persistence && pnpm run acceptance:model && pnpm run acceptance:capability && pnpm run acceptance:runtime && pnpm run acceptance:security && python -m scripts.acceptance.check_release_closure
